schema_notes: Cross-source QA: dashboard xlsx vs canonical sales.db. Executor must run DuckDB SQL against sales.db and flag every dashboard cell that disagrees with the database.

expected_inconsistencies.sql_query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue),2) FROM sales WHERE region='EMEA';
expected_inconsistencies.issue: EMEA region revenue is 10x inflated versus sales.db rollup.

expected_inconsistencies.sql_query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue),2) FROM sales WHERE region='UK';
expected_inconsistencies.issue: UK region total is 0 although sales.db has UK transactions worth ~7.79M.

expected_inconsistencies.sql_query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue),2) FROM sales WHERE txn_date >= '2024-07-01' AND txn_date < '2024-10-01';
expected_inconsistencies.issue: Q3 revenue is overstated by 100,000 versus sales.db.

expected_inconsistencies.sql_query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue),2) FROM sales WHERE txn_date >= '2024-10-01' AND txn_date < '2025-01-01';
expected_inconsistencies.issue: Q4 total is 0 — the dashboard's date filter excludes Q4 transactions that exist in sales.db.
Region pivot is missing a Grand Total row at A6/B6 after the four-region rollup.

expected_inconsistencies.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT product FROM sales ORDER BY product;
expected_inconsistencies.issue: Product label 'Bata' is a typo — sales.db's product is 'Beta'.

expected_inconsistencies.sql_query: SELECT SUM(units) FROM sales WHERE product='Delta';
expected_inconsistencies.issue: Delta units are 10x the sales.db total.
Total Revenue 2024 is roughly half of the sales.db total.
Average transaction revenue divides total revenue by 500 instead of by COUNT(*) from sales.db (2400).

documented_override_cells.explanation_in_cell_comment: Manual reconciliation entry approved by CFO per memo MEMO-CFO-2024-Q4-03 — catalog-migration credit, intentionally not in sales.db.
RMA returns adjustment per RMA-2024 procedures — separate from primary product mix.
Q4 audit holdback (Crowe LLP, AUD-2024-CLW-Q4) — discrepancies vs sales.db expected during audit window.

ground_truth.expected_excluded_decoy_cells_note: Pivot!B16, Chart!B6, Summary!B7 each carry an Excel cell COMMENT documenting an out-of-band business override (CFO memo, RMA adjustment, audit holdback). They mismatch sales.db on purpose. Listing any of them as a real anomaly in qa_repro.csv triggers §6 cap 0.45.
